chapter_summary: Gheranda Samhita GhS_1.22 to GhS_1.44 continue the shatkarma cleansings of ghatastha yoga. It completes the secret prakshalana of washing the abdominal shakti nadi navel deep in water, said unattainable even by the gods and to grant a divine body, devadeha. It gives Danta dhauti, cleansing teeth root, lengthening the lambika by milking with butter, cleansing the ear cavities to awaken nada, and pressing the frontal aperture so divine sight, divyadrishti, arises. It gives Hrd dhauti in three modes, Danda reed stick, Vamana water vomiting, Vasa cloth swallowing, against heart disease and kapha pitta. Finally Mula shodhana cleanses the root, easing apana and kindling the digestive fire, vahni mandala.

story.title: The Vessel Made Divine, Gherandas Secret Cleansings
story.arc: Gheranda continues the shatkarma inward and downward through the body vessel. He reveals the secret washing of the abdominal shakti nadi navel deep, so guarded the gods cannot reach it, yet granting a divine body. He cleanses the head gates, the teeth root, the tongue milked until it lengthens, the ear cavities until the inner sound dawns, and the frontal aperture until divine sight is born. He cleanses the heart by stick, vomited water, and cloth, then the root, kindling the digestive fire so the body shines.

teachings.teaching: The shakti nadi prakshalana, washed navel deep in water, is supremely secret, para gopya, unattainable even by the gods, and by mere cleansing the body becomes a divine body, devadeha.
teachings.lens_note: For Sharma the secrecy is transmission, the deepest pranic purification comes only by the guru given practice working the shakti nadi through which kundalini rises, and devadeha is literal, the vessel transmuted toward the deathless light body.

teachings.teaching: Maha dhauti does not arise in one who has not first mastered the ardha retention capacity, purification follows a strict order of prerequisites.
teachings.lens_note: Sharmas krama, no opening comes by skipping steps, an unprepared vessel yields nothing.

teachings.teaching: Danta dhauti cleanses five seats, teeth root, tongue root, the two ear cavities and the frontal aperture, supreme because these serve dharana.
teachings.lens_note: Sharma reads the five head gates as apertures of dharana, cleansed because a fouled gate cannot hold prana, the teeth and tongue root bordering khechari territory.

teachings.teaching: Milking with butter and lengthening the lambika removes kapha and conquers ageing, death and disease, the tongue becoming dirgha lambika.
teachings.lens_note: The physical groundwork of khechari mudra, the tongue lengthened to seal the cranial aperture and reach the nectar amrita, the closed gate stopping it being burned by the gastric fire so decay halts.

teachings.teaching: Rubbing the ear cavities makes inner sound, nada, manifest, and pressing the frontal aperture clears kapha so the nadi purifies and divine sight, divyadrishti, arises.
teachings.lens_note: For Sharma the doorways of laya yoga, anahata nada and ajna divyadrishti, a gross cleansing precipitating subtle perception, physical shuddhi the precondition for the divine senses.

teachings.teaching: Hrd dhauti is threefold, by danda reed stick, by vamana vomiting, by vasa cloth, and destroys heart disease, gulma, fever, spleen, leprosy and kapha pitta.
teachings.lens_note: Sharma reads heart cleansing as clearing the anahata seat where prana stagnates, removing kapha pitta lifting the doshic veil that blocks prana from rising past the heart.

teachings.teaching: Until the root, mula, is cleansed, apana stays harsh, apana krurata, so root cleansing softens the bowels, cures indigestion, and kindles the digestive fire.
teachings.lens_note: The lens keystone, the ascent depends on apana at muladhara reversed and merged with prana to awaken the fire that lifts shakti, kindling the vahni mandala the first cause of the upward process, nothing rises until the bottom is clean.
